title: For the Body That Carried You Here
scripture_text: Do you not know that your body is a temple of the Holy Spirit within you?
reflection: You are a miracle walking. A thinking, breathing, feeling miracle, and you treat yourself like a machine.
body:
Your body has done a lot for you today. It breathed without you asking. It pumped blood. It walked you here. It digested breakfast. It blinked.

It has also been tired, sore, hungry, anxious, and uncomfortable, and it has still shown up, every day, for the years you have been alive.

Thank it. Not in a self-help way. In a prayer way. The body is not a problem to fix. It is a gift to steward. A temple, the psalmist says. A place where the Holy Spirit has chosen to live.

Stretch. Drink water. Go to bed at a reasonable hour. These are not small things. They are forms of worship.
prayer: Lord, thank You for this body. Help me care for it the way You care for it. Amen.
